nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Cryptic forest falcon
nodes.summary: Cryptic forest falcon（Cryptic forest falcon，学名 Micrastur mintoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜雨林
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括白喉䳍、巴西穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴西
nodes.summary: 巴西是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联854种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、侏䳍、白腹拟䳍等854种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cryptic forest falcon primarily inhabits the lowland terra firme forests of South America, a habitat characterized by its tall trees and dense, diverse understory. It also frequents the Várzea forest, a seasonally flooded forest with a bamboo understory.Simon, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cryptic forest falcon primarily inhabits the lowland terra firme forests of South America, a habitat characterized by its tall trees and dense, diverse understory. It also frequents the Várzea forest, a seasonally flooded forest with a bamboo understory.Simon, J

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: An analysis of forest cover change from 2000 to 2012 showed that this species lost 22% of its habitat within three generations, leading some to believe it should be considered globally Near Threatened. While its population size hasn't been quantified, it is believed to be decreasing. This decrease is largely based on its habitat loss due to deforestation. It is suspected to lose 34-51% of its habitat over three generations (26 years)
